# ZGNAL Infographic Lab

> AI-powered infographic generator. Research-backed, consulting-grade infographics in 60 seconds.

## What It Does

ZGNAL Infographic Lab transforms any topic into a professional infographic using a 7-stage AI pipeline:

1. **Sentinel** — Analyzes your input and identifies key themes
2. **Oracle** — Researches the topic using 22 trusted sources
3. **Architect** — Structures information into the optimal layout
4. **Compliance** — Validates facts and source quality
5. **Assembler** — Composes the visual prompt with style + layout DNA
6. **Renderer** — Generates the infographic image via Gemini AI
7. **Provenance** — Traces every source and decision for transparency

## Key Features

- 20 visual styles (Executive Institutional, Cyberpunk Neon, Kawaii, and 17 more)
- 20 layout types (Bento Grid, Hub & Spoke, Timeline, and 17 more)
- 400+ unique style × layout combinations
- 22 trusted research sources
- Export to PNG, PDF, and PPTX
- Full provenance tracking on every generation

## Styles

- /styles/executive-institutional — McKinsey-grade corporate dashboards
- /styles/deconstruct — NYT-style exploded views
- /styles/aerial-explainer — Drone-view isometric cutaways
- /styles/technical-schematic — Blueprint process flows
- /styles/craft-handmade — Watercolor narrative paths
- /styles/bold-graphic — Swiss poster high-contrast
- /styles/cyberpunk-neon — Neon glow futuristic
- /styles/claymation — Soft 3D clay objects
- /styles/kawaii — Cute pastel characters
- /styles/storybook-watercolor — Delicate paint washes
- /styles/chalkboard — Educational chalk-on-green
- /styles/aged-academia — Scholarly sepia engravings
- /styles/corporate-memphis — Flat geometric characters
- /styles/origami — Paper-folded 3D forms
- /styles/pixel-art — Retro 8-bit sprites
- /styles/ui-wireframe — Clean wireframe specification
- /styles/subway-map — Transit-map processes
- /styles/ikea-manual — Minimal assembly steps
- /styles/knolling — Top-down flat-lay organization
- /styles/lego-brick — Plastic brick construction

## Layouts

- /layouts/bento-grid — Modular mixed-size panel grid
- /layouts/binary-comparison — Two-panel side-by-side
- /layouts/bridge — Problem-to-solution pathway
- /layouts/circular-flow — Continuous cycle diagram
- /layouts/comic-strip — Sequential visual storytelling
- /layouts/comparison-matrix — Multi-column feature grid
- /layouts/dashboard — KPI tiles and chart panels
- /layouts/funnel — Narrowing stage visualization
- /layouts/hierarchical-layers — Stacked level bands
- /layouts/hub-spoke — Central concept radiating outward
- /layouts/iceberg — Visible tip, hidden depth
- /layouts/isometric-map — 3D spatial overview
- /layouts/jigsaw — Interlocking puzzle concepts
- /layouts/linear-progression — Sequential timeline
- /layouts/periodic-table — Categorized element grid
- /layouts/story-mountain — Narrative arc shape
- /layouts/structural-breakdown — Exploded cross-section
- /layouts/tree-branching — Root splitting to branches
- /layouts/venn-diagram — Overlapping relationship circles
- /layouts/winding-roadmap — Curved milestone path

## Pricing

Free during public preview. No credit card required.
